name: Task Logs
description: Reads task execution logs by task name or ID.

tools.name: knowledge-task-logs.getLogs
tools.description: Get execution logs for a task. Looks up by ID first, then by title match. Returns logs grouped by module. Signature: taskLogs.getLogs({ task: string, module?: string, tail?: number }).

task.description: Task ID or name (title substring match).

module.description: Optional module ID to filter logs (e.g. 'orchestrator', 'executor-jules').

tail.description: Return only the last N lines per module. Default: return all.
